parameters-en.Rate: Controls the speed or rate of the effect. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Intensity: Controls the depth or intensity of the effect.
parameters-en.Lamp Bias: Adjusts the amount of current going to the original pedal's filament bulb. Lower values result in a smoother LFO sweep (closer to a sine wave); higher values result in a more dramatic LFO sweep (closer to a square wave).
parameters-en.Spread: Controls the apparent stereo spread between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Adjusts the overall output level of the modulation effect
